projectName: NFT-ZK Lease: Privacy-Preserving Dynamic Asset Rental
hackathon: Authorized to Act: Auth0 for AI Agents | $10,000
description: NFT-ZK Lease introduces a privacy-preserving rental layer for ERC-721 assets, solving the trust gap in digital asset sharing. Unlike standard marketplaces, this system allows owners to grant time-bound, capability-specific access to AI agents without transferring ownership. The core innovation is a ZK circuit that verifies a user holds a valid lease credential without revealing their identity or the specific asset details to the public ledger. Smart contracts manage the lease state and dynamic m
angle: Enables NFT owners to grant time-bound, capability-specific access to AI agents without transferring ownership or revealing off-chain usage data.
